creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text: How about we use flavors instead of subpackages? This would be a less intrusive change to the ports tree, keeping the change within teach Makefile. I don't think bapt@ intended a proliferation of slave ports when creating the subpackages feature. I see subpackages as a vehicle to split krb5 into server and client. That is the plan when the subpackages feature matures a little.
